prompt:
National Geographic-style wildlife photography (intended use).
Scene: a snowy boreal forest at dawn, dark spruce trees in soft bokeh, low golden light catching ice crystals in the foreground.
Subject: a wild red fox standing alert mid-step, looking off-camera to the left, with visible white breath in the cold air.
Key details: photorealistic; vivid orange coat contrasting with white snow, fine fur texture, snow on the fox's shoulders, ultra-sharp focus on the eyes, subtle motion feel.
Constraints: no other animals, no humans, no text, no watermark.
